jd_text: Job Description Manage the operational administration of the foundation Support IT Director in delivering the IT environment for the building Provide helpdesk support and troubleshooting at first line Ensure users of the facilities receive a professional and proactive response at all times Maintains network performance by performing network monitoring and analysis, and performance tuning; troubleshooting network problems; escalating problems to vendors Qualifications Bachelor degree or equivalent in Computer Engineering/IT Experience in the IT domain with at least 4 years work experience in an IT support role About Dubai Foundation for Women and Children: The Dubai Foundation for Women and Children is the first authorized non-profit shelter and humanitarian care in the United Arab Emirates to care for women and children who are victims of domestic violence, child abuse, and victims of human trafficking. It was established in late 2007 in order to provide victims with immediate shelter, protection and support services, in accordance with international human rights conventions. Job Category Information Technology Technician Advertiser Dubai Government Educational-level Bachelor Required Nationality UAE Only Monthly Salary 20001-30000 Schedule-Time Full time Job Posting 23/03/2026 Unposting Date 22/04/2026
